testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out: Given User Navigate to Navia................................................passed When User Click login with client code......................................passed And User Enter Client Code..................................................passed And User Enter Password....................................................passed And User Click Agree CheckBox...............................................passed And User Click Login button.................................................passed And User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy...........................passed And User Click Login Again..................................................passed

testcase.name: User Check The Mutual Fund - UPI Payment - functionality
testcase.system-out: When Navigate to home page..................................................passed And User MouseOver Dashboard and Click Mutual Funds.........................passed And User Click Explore......................................................passed And User Search "Navi Flexi Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth" in Serach Box and enter.passed And User Click One Time , enter amount "100" and click pay now..............passed And User Click enter UPI ID "6374837965@ptsbi" and Click Pay Via UPI........passed
